title: Starlish ⭐
description: Style your Enchantments & Potions with Icons!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65d837d5ca246d4935120417a71bf67497da91b.png)

# Style your Enchantments & Potions with Icons!

This mod will remove the Roman numbers of Enchantments & Potions and instead put Stars to represent the level! You can also add an icon before the Enchantment to represent which tools/gears it should be applied.

![level_color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bde9aab5220749dd19b164b7fff17ad760c1f16.jpeg)

Potions effect time will now be in h/m/s format (for example: 1h35m14s)  
(enabled by default)

![potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/568e6494404d80a65bed8df84a7c3d786e67cdcf_0.webp)

If an Enchantment is at its max Level, the color of the stars will change to Gold by default!  
(you can disable it in the config file)

![level_max_color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65bf137d8b4f9a7c3c9ce11d5441362f609c170b.jpeg)

You can also add Enchantments from mods, just put it in the list as the following: "mod_id:enchantment_id". (This is only for the icon before the name. For the stars, you don't need to do it.)

![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41a1c0585f61c28f7870b21a51a9113910b263bd.jpeg)

Here's what you can customise:  
- Color of the Enchantment if it is a Treasure, Curse or Normal Enchantment.
- Color and Form of the icons.
- Color of the Potion if it is Beneficial, Harmful or Neutral.
- Color and Format of the Potion effect time.

## Modpacks

You are free to use this mod in any modpacks, as long as you provide a link to this page.
